untranslatable_reason: Signal requires confirmation on 'bar C or C+1' (multi-bar sequential logic) and 'new extreme relative to prior price action' (requires dynamic lookback comparison). The schema only supports single-bar conditions without temporal sequencing or dynamic historical comparisons. Additionally, 'sliding along the bands' (price oscillating near upper Bollinger Band) cannot be expressed with available operators; would need range/proximity logic not in allowed operators.
translation_notes: Translated core breakout logic: price crossing MA with volume surge + MACD confirmation. Exit conditions use MA crossback and MACD divergence as proxies. Stop loss set conservatively at 2%. Parameters ma_period, volume_multiplier, macd_lookback_bars, confirmation_bars_required, and initial_position_size_percent marked as [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] in original and cannot be auto-filled without domain specification.
